context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

Our K8s API server has been hitting rate limits since we deployed our agents. Looking at the configs we have full k8sattributes extract blocks in the daemonset, the cluster-collector, AND the gateway. They're doing identical lookups. How do we fix this without losing pod metadata?

checklist.name: no-removes-k8sattributes-from-daemonset-clust
checklist.description: Recommends keeping full `extract.metadata` in exactly one role (typically the gateway) and setting `passthrough: true` on the other roles so they forward pod UID/name without issuing their own API-server lookups. A response that removes k8sattributes from daemonset/cluster-collector entirely (instead of using passthrough) or that says to add caching rather than reduce extraction roles is a FAIL.
